# Shohrukh Jalolov

> Shohrukh Jalolov is an entrepreneur and business developer based in Dushanbe, Tajikistan. He is Business Developer at CifarX, co-founder of the startup Refresh, and the founder of Makon, his own real estate product. He has also worked with SoftClub, LakLak, Webmarket, and Flora Park.

## Facts

- Name: Shohrukh Jalolov
- Location: Dushanbe, Tajikistan
- Office: Regus, Buston City
- Email: jalolovshohrukh@gmail.com
- Roles:
  - Business Developer at CifarX (https://cifarx.com)
  - Co-founder of Refresh (https://refresh.tj)
  - Founder of Makon, his own real estate product in Tajikistan
- Companies he has worked with:
  - SoftClub (https://www.softclub.tj/)
  - LakLak (https://laklakmarket.tj/)
  - Webmarket (https://webmarket.tj/)
  - Flora Park (https://florapark.tj/)
- Education:
  - B.A. in Computer Science and Mathematics, Lewis & Clark College (Portland, Oregon, USA)
  - High school, Dushanbe International School (Dushanbe, Tajikistan)
- Languages: Tajik, Russian, English, Turkish, Uzbek
- Countries and cities visited:
  - United States: Los Angeles, San Francisco, Portland, Seattle, Denver, Fort Collins, New York, Boston, Philadelphia, Washington D.C., Niagara Falls
  - Canada: Vancouver, Victoria
  - Russia: Moscow
  - Romania: Bucharest
  - Türkiye: Istanbul
  - Uzbekistan: Tashkent, Samarkand, Termez, Denau
  - Kazakhstan: Almaty
  - China: Shanghai, Guangzhou, Wenzhou, Yiwu, Wuxi, Jinan, Zibo, Boxing, Chongqing, Fuzhou

Russian-language versions of every page are available under /ru.

## Summary

Shohrukh Jalolov works at the intersection of business development, startups, and
real estate. He leads business development at CifarX, co-founded Refresh, and founded
Makon, his own real estate product. He writes weekly public updates about his work and
is focused on helping build the technology ecosystem of Central Asia.
